_diagnostic.finding: All lora_B tensors zero in pre-pivot MoE-LoRA adapters
_diagnostic.evidence: 6 stacks sampled (chat-fr, cpp, python, reasoning, power, rust) — 512/512 lora_B with norm=0.000000 exactly; lora_A normal (max norm ~4); custom MoE-LoRA routers trained normally (max norm ~4.63).
_diagnostic.interpretation: The pre-pivot MoE-LoRA training path did not backprop gradients to experts lora_B. Adapter delta = A @ 0 = 0 for every module-layer, hence 1190/1190 pairs show 0.00° mean angle — NOT a cosine computation artifact but an authentic training bug.
_diagnostic.post_pivot_sanity: Standard LoRA post-2026-04-16 pivot has 204/204 lora_B nonzero (max norm 0.9976 on lora-qwen36-35b/chat-fr). This confirms the pivot away from custom MoE-LoRA was the right call.
_diagnostic.implication_for_this_matrix: Results below are NOT a meaningful forgetting signal. Matrix is retained as a diagnostic artifact documenting the training bug.
